parameters.query:
WITH settings AS (
  SELECT
    COALESCE(
      (
        SELECT (value #>> '{}')::INTEGER
        FROM gnote.app_settings
        WHERE key = 'deleted_messages.ttl_days'
      ),
      7
    ) AS ttl_days
),

deleted_rows AS (
  DELETE FROM gnote.messages m
  USING settings s
  WHERE m.deleted_at IS NOT NULL
    AND m.deleted_at < NOW() - (s.ttl_days || ' days')::INTERVAL
  RETURNING
    m.id,
    m.user_id,
    m.topic_id,
    m.content,
    m.created_at,
    m.deleted_at,
    m.message_type,
    m.file_name
)

SELECT
  COUNT(*) AS permanently_deleted_count,
  NOW() AS purge_executed_at
FROM deleted_rows;

WITH settings AS (
  SELECT
    COALESCE(
      (
        SELECT (value #>> '{}')::INTEGER
        FROM gnote.app_settings
        WHERE key = 'search.session_ttl_days'
      ),
      7
    ) AS ttl_days
),

old_sessions AS (
  SELECT ss.id
  FROM gnote.search_sessions ss
  CROSS JOIN settings s
  WHERE ss.created_at < NOW() - (s.ttl_days || ' days')::INTERVAL
),

deleted_results AS (
  DELETE FROM gnote.search_session_results r
  USING old_sessions s
  WHERE r.search_session_id = s.id
  RETURNING r.id
),

deleted_sessions AS (
  DELETE FROM gnote.search_sessions ss
  USING old_sessions s
  WHERE ss.id = s.id
  RETURNING ss.id
)

SELECT
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM deleted_sessions) AS deleted_search_sessions,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM deleted_results) AS deleted_search_results,
  NOW() AS cleanup_executed_at;

WITH settings AS (
  SELECT
    COALESCE(
      (
        SELECT (value #>> '{}')::INTEGER
        FROM gnote.app_settings
        WHERE key = 'pending.cleanup_hours'
      ),
      24
    ) AS cleanup_hours
),

old_pending AS (
  SELECT
    pm.id,
    pm.user_id,
    pm.message_uuid,
    pm.created_at
  FROM gnote.pending_messages pm
  CROSS JOIN settings s
  WHERE pm.created_at < NOW() - (s.cleanup_hours || ' hours')::INTERVAL
),

deleted_metadata_linked AS (
  DELETE FROM gnote.message_ai_metadata meta
  USING old_pending p
  WHERE meta.user_id = p.user_id
    AND meta.message_id IS NULL
    AND (
      meta.pending_message_id = p.id
      OR meta.message_uuid = p.message_uuid
    )
  RETURNING meta.id
),

deleted_pending AS (
  DELETE FROM gnote.pending_messages pm
  USING old_pending p
  WHERE pm.id = p.id
  RETURNING pm.id
),

deleted_metadata_orphans AS (
  DELETE FROM gnote.message_ai_metadata meta
  CROSS JOIN settings s
  WHERE meta.message_id IS NULL
    AND COALESCE(meta.source_status, 'pending') = 'pending'
    AND meta.created_at < NOW() - (s.cleanup_hours || ' hours')::INTERVAL
  RETURNING meta.id
),

deleted_user_state AS (
  DELETE FROM gnote.user_state us
  CROSS JOIN settings s
  WHERE us.state IN ('waiting_for_extra_keywords', 'waiting_search_query')
    AND us.updated_at < NOW() - (s.cleanup_hours || ' hours')::INTERVAL
  RETURNING us.user_id
)

SELECT
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM deleted_pending) AS deleted_pending_messages,
  (
    (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM deleted_metadata_linked)
    +
    (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM deleted_metadata_orphans)
  ) AS deleted_pending_metadata,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM deleted_user_state) AS deleted_stale_user_states,
  NOW() AS cleanup_executed_at;

nodes.name: Cleanup stale pending messages and metadata

main.node: Cleanup stale pending messages and metadata
